chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.66 of 2023 Syed Taqi Abbas Versus Syed Naqi Abbas Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as office objections No.1, 5, 15 to 19 and 23 not complied with since 08.08.2023. Dated: 13.12.2023 None present. -.-.- Impugned in this appeal is a decree passed in summary suit No.01 of 2023 after dismissal of leave application. When this appeal was fixed on first date appellant and his counsel were called absent and as an indulgence seven days’ time was granted for compliance however in vain as today yet again the matter is fixed for non-prosecution and there is no one for the appellant either to hold brief or to proceed with the matter. Instant High Court Appeal as such is dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge
